scope.label: flow-pack
scope.note: PROXY BOUNDARY: scope = all CLOSED issues carrying the flow-pack label, used as a Phase-1 proxy for "Umbrella #1". This is an explicit assumption, not a verified umbrella subtree.

findings: Recomputed 4 closed flow-pack issues and 2 merged flow-pack PRs.
Median issue cycle time 42h; median PR merge time 9h.
inferred: The exact Umbrella #1 subtree boundary is NOT proven by this run; "all-flow-pack" is a proxy.
Per-epic sub-issue counts via hierarchy API (best-effort, may be incomplete).
proven: Delivery volume and timing for flow-pack work can be recomputed deterministically from GitHub state.
notProven: Whether FPAT IMPROVED delivery — this is a single baseline (n=1); no comparison cohort exists.
Causes of any timing outliers; root causes are not established here.
The precise Umbrella #1 boundary (board/hierarchy scope intentionally not solved in Phase-1).
